SQLScript:
WITH EligibleMemberData AS(
SELECT DISTINCT   
    COALESCE(nullif(mpb.UniquePersonKey,'None'),nullif(mpb.PlanMemberID,'None')) AS MemberID
  ,COALESCE(nullif(ompb.UniquePersonKey,'None'),nullif(ompb.PlanMemberID,'None')) AS OriginalMemberID
FROM MemberPersonBridge mpb
  INNER JOIN HedisEligibleMember hem
    ON mpb.BISInternalPersonId = hem.BISInternalPersonId
  LEFT JOIN MemberPersonBridge ompb
    ON ompb.BISInternalPersonId = hem.BISInternalPersonId
    AND ompb.IsOriginalMemberId = 1
),
ProviderData as (
SELECT
  ProviderID
 ,NPI
 ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY NPI ORDER BY FileID DESC,ProviderID DESC) as RowNumber
FROM Provider
),
EMRData AS (
SELECT 
 COALESCE(nullif(el.UniquePersonKey,'None'),nullif(el.PlanMemberID,'None')) AS MemberID
,el.CPTCode
,el.LOINCode
,CASE
    WHEN CAST(el.ResultValue as DECIMAL(28,10)) IS NOT NULL THEN el.ResultValue
    ELSE NULL
 END AS Result 
,date_format(to_date(el.DOS), 'yyyyMMdd') AS DOS
,CASE 
    WHEN el.ProviderID LIKE 'NPI-%' THEN COALESCE(p.providerId,el.ProviderID)
    ELSE el.ProviderID
 END AS ProviderID
,el.SourceName
,CASE
    WHEN CAST(el.ResultValue as DECIMAL(28,10)) IS NULL THEN el.ResultValue 
    ELSE NULL
 END AS AdditionalColumn1 
,'' AS AdditionalColumn2
,'' AS AdditionalColumn3
,'' AS AdditionalColumn4
,'' AS AdditionalColumn5
,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY COALESCE(nullif(el.UniquePersonKey,'None'),nullif(el.PlanMemberId,'None')), el.ClaimNumber,el.ClaimLineNumber,el.DOS,el.LOINCode,el.ResultValue, el.CPTCode  ORDER BY el.FileId DESC) AS RowNumber
FROM EMRLab el 
  LEFT JOIN Providerdata p
      ON REPLACE(UPPER(el.ProviderID), 'NPI-', '') = p.NPI
        AND p.RowNumber = 1
),
LabData AS (
SELECT 
 COALESCE(nullif(l.UniquePersonKey,'None'),nullif(l.MemberNumber,'None')) AS MemberID
,l.CPTCode
,l.LOINCode
,CASE 
    WHEN CAST(l.ResultValue as DECIMAL(28,10)) IS NOT NULL THEN l.ResultValue
    ELSE NULL
 END AS Result 
,date_format(to_date(l.DOS), 'yyyyMMdd') AS DOS
,CASE 
    WHEN l.ProviderID LIKE 'NPI-%' THEN COALESCE(p.providerId,l.ProviderID)
    ELSE l.ProviderID
 END AS ProviderID
,l.SourceName
,CASE  
    WHEN CAST(l.ResultValue as DECIMAL(28,10)) IS NULL THEN l.ResultValue 
    ELSE NULL
 END AS AdditionalColumn1 
,'' AS AdditionalColumn2
,'' AS AdditionalColumn3
,'' AS AdditionalColumn4
,'' AS AdditionalColumn5
,ROW_NUMBER() OVER(PARTITION BY COALESCE(nullif(l.UniquePersonKey,'None'),nullif(l.MemberNumber,'None')), l.ClaimNumber,l.ClaimLineNumber,l.DOS,l.LOINCode,l.ResultValue, l.CPTCode ORDER BY l.FileId DESC) AS RowNumber
FROM Lab l
  LEFT JOIN Providerdata p
      ON REPLACE(UPPER(l.ProviderID), 'NPI-', '') = p.NPI
        AND p.RowNumber = 1
),
CombinedLab AS(
SELECT
   MemberID
  ,CPTCode
  ,LOINCode
  ,Result
  ,DOS
  ,ProviderID
  ,SourceName
  ,AdditionalColumn1
  ,AdditionalColumn2
  ,AdditionalColumn3
  ,AdditionalColumn4
  ,AdditionalColumn5
FROM EMRData 
WHERE
RowNumber = 1
UNION ALL
SELECT 
   MemberID
  ,CPTCode
  ,LOINCode
  ,Result
  ,DOS
  ,ProviderID
  ,SourceName
  ,AdditionalColumn1
  ,AdditionalColumn2
  ,AdditionalColumn3
  ,AdditionalColumn4
  ,AdditionalColumn5
FROM LabData
WHERE
RowNumber = 1
)
SELECT DISTINCT
   em.OriginalMemberId AS MemberId
  ,cl.CPTCode
  ,cl.LOINCode AS LOINCCode
  ,cl.Result AS TestResultValue
  ,cl.DOS AS DateOfService
  ,COALESCE(cl.providerId,'00000000') AS ProviderID
  ,cl.SourceName AS DataSourceName
  ,cl.AdditionalColumn1
  ,cl.AdditionalColumn2
  ,cl.AdditionalColumn3
  ,cl.AdditionalColumn4
  ,cl.AdditionalColumn5
  ,current_timestamp() AS LoadDateTime
FROM CombinedLab cl
  INNER JOIN EligibleMemberData em 
    ON cl.MemberId = em.MemberId
